Convert data.frame to parameter list for batch functions

Source: R/paramsdf2list.R
params_df2list.Rd

Converts a data.frame where each row represents one site/station into a list of parameter lists suitable for batch writing functions like write_sol_batch() or write_man_batch().

Usage

params_df2list(
  df,
  target = c("write_sol_batch", "write_man_batch"),
  id_col = NULL,
  validate = TRUE
)

Arguments

df

Data.frame where each row represents one site/station

target

Character string specifying the target function. One of:

  • "write_sol_batch": For soil parameters (texture, thickness, cn, rew)

  • "write_man_batch": For management parameters (var_02 to var_21)

id_col

Name of the column containing site/station identifiers. Default: "site" for soil, "station" for management. Set to NULL to exclude from parameters.

validate

Logical. If TRUE (default), validates parameter values.

Value

List of parameter lists suitable for the target batch function.
